title: existing_state
description: The scout's report on whether the idea overlaps work already in flight. An empty `overlaps` list is valid and means the idea is genuinely new.

overlaps.description: Existing proposals / features the idea duplicates, extends, or conflicts with. Empty ⇒ no overlap found.

kind.description: in_progress ⇒ a draft in docs/proposals/.workspace/; accepted ⇒ a proposal in docs/proposals/; feature ⇒ a feature/bug doc.

summary.description: One line: what the existing artifact covers and how it overlaps.

recommendation.description: amend ⇒ fold the idea into this; supersede ⇒ replace it; new ⇒ overlap is incidental, proceed new.

roadmap_fit.description: Where the idea fits relative to the current roadmap / proposal queue.
